title: OnboardingRecommendation
description: Output of `prevail onboard recommend --json`. Given the user's free-form answers (read from stdin), the engine proposes a starter set of domains to scaffold. The user then picks a subset and feeds them to `prevail onboard apply`.

summary.description: One-line description of the proposed domain.

reason.description: Why this domain was recommended, grounded in the user's answers.

recommended.description: True if pre-selected (strong fit); false if offered but optional.

starterGoals.description: Optional starter goals to seed the domain's manifest.

suggestedSkills.description: Optional skill ids to enable on scaffold.

rationale.description: Overall narrative explaining the recommended set.

generated_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp the recommendation was generated.
